heading: Options
body:
| Field  | Type             | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Necessity |
| ------ | ---------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| filter | document         | Any MongoDB Search operator to filter the documents based on metadata or certain search criteria, which can help narrow down the scope of vector search.                                                          | Optional  |
| k      | number           | Number of nearest neighbors to return. You can specify a number higher than the number of documents to return ($limit) to increase accuracy.                                                                      | Required  |
| path   | string           | Indexed knnVector type field to search.                                                                                                                                                                           | Required  |
| score  | document         | Score assigned to matching documents in the results. To learn more, see scoring behavior.                                                                                                                         | Optional  |
| vector | array of numbers | Array of numbers of BSON (Binary Javascript Object Notation) types int or double that represent the query vector. The array size must match the number of vector dimensions specified in the index for the field. | Required  |
